name: Greek Sesame Bread Rings
method: Add the sugar, yeast, and lukewarm water into the bowl.
Mix well and keep aside until bubbles are formed.
Add the flour and salt into the mixture.
Knead the dough well and start forming ring structures from the dough
Add the sesame seeds on top of the rings and place the rings on a
Bake the dish for about thirty minutes.
Your dish is ready to be served.
